Wave 3 — TUI integration, AudioSync screen, snapshot/restore

blockers.description: libasound2-dev + pkg-config not installed — cargo build will fail without them

human_actions_pending.context: cpal requires ALSA dev headers to compile on Linux

decisions.rationale: Latest stable, works through PipeWire ALSA compat layer

decisions.decision: LED drive sends UsbCmd directly — bypasses TUI loop
decisions.rationale: TUI polls at 50ms which would inflate LED latency above 33ms budget
ITE 8291 keyboard takes ~15ms per write; 30fps saturates without overload

decisions.decision: save: false mandatory on all audio LED writes

decisions.rationale: pkexec resets XDG_RUNTIME_DIR; PipeWire socket unreachable without fix

decisions.decision: Effects: Pulse, ColorShift, Wave, Breathe, Random (auto-cycles at 8s)

next_action: Run: sudo apt install libasound2-dev pkg-config — then execute Plan 01 (Wave 1)
context_notes: All 3 plans are fully written and checker-verified (PASS, 10/10 invariants). No code has been touched yet. Execution starts from Plan 01 Wave 1.
